name: strategy-bp
description: Decision-first strategic research for product direction, market evidence, falsifiable hypotheses, and action thresholds.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-based strategic research for product decisions.
interface.longDescription: Strategy BP turns a product direction into decision questions, falsifiable hypotheses, evidence standards, and explicit action thresholds without making unapproved product decisions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $strategy-bp to evaluate a product direction with traceable evidence and explicit action thresholds.
